summary: Completed comprehensive RBAC testing for Art Connect Africa Feed and Statistics features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI correctly implements RBAC restrictions: Artists can post/like/comment, Institutions cannot interact but can view feed and access detailed statistics.

issues: Dark theme with warm African colors is well implemented

passed_tests: Artist CANNOT access detailed statistics (403 Forbidden)
Feed page loads at /feed with posts displayed
Feed link appears in navbar (Fil in French)
Artist sees 'Nouveau post' button on feed
Artist can create post via UI dialog
Artist like button turns red when liked
Artist can add comment via UI
Institution sees warning about read-only access
Institution does NOT see 'New Post' button
Institution like buttons have disabled styling (opacity-50, cursor-not-allowed)
Institution can access Statistics with detailed tabs (Demographics, Geography, Activity)
Artist Statistics page shows limited public stats with CTA to register as institution
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with 10 artists, 1 institution, 1 admin
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC for Feed and Statistics is fully implemented and tested. Artists can post/like/comment, Institutions can only view feed and access detailed stats. All backend APIs return correct 403 status for unauthorized actions. Frontend correctly shows/hides UI elements based on user role.
